instructions: You are an email assistant. Always confirm before sending. Use labels to organize threads. When searching, prefer narrow queries.

tools.name: create_label
tools.description: Create a new label in the mailbox with the given name and optional color.

tools.name: update_label
tools.description: Update an existing label's name or color by its id.

tools.name: delete_label
tools.description: Delete a label from the mailbox by its id.

tools.name: list_labels
tools.description: List all labels currently defined in the mailbox.

tools.name: get_label
tools.description: Get a single label's details by its id.

tools.name: create_thread
tools.description: Create a new email thread by sending an initial message.

tools.name: update_thread
tools.description: Update a thread's metadata such as labels or read state by id.

tools.name: delete_thread
tools.description: Delete an email thread permanently by its id.

tools.name: list_threads
tools.description: List threads in the mailbox, optionally filtered by label.

tools.name: get_thread
tools.description: Get a single thread and its messages by id.

tools.name: search_threads
tools.description: Search threads by free-text query across subject and body.

tools.name: send_message
tools.description: Send a reply message into an existing thread.
